ns0:entry.ns0:title: affaan-m/ECC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/affaan-m/ECC
Language: javascript
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
Language: javascript
Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills

Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/awesome-claude-code-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/awesome-claude-code-toolkit
Language: javascript
